title.en: The nine-turn immortal golden body was broken!

content.en:
Wow!

Ye Tian used the Great Thousand Dao Technique, the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step, and rushed into the battlefield with an extremely fast and ghostly figure.

At the same time, he urged the Dacheng Forbidden Body and the Nine Transformations of the Defensive Dao Technique to Immortalize the Golden Body and the Ancient Desolate Body, and let the attacks of the other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors bombard his body, he didn't care at all.

The nine-turn immortal golden body was broken!

The primeval desolation has also been broken!

Ye Tian was not panicked at all, he forcibly endured the injury with his forbidden body, and mobilized the power of the forbidden origin to continuously repair the injury.

When it comes to saving his life, he is invincible!

In this way, Ye Tian stubbornly withstood the attack of a famous Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and entered the Forbidden Spirit Root, and directly cut off a branch of the Forbidden Spirit Root with a single blow of the Ancient Slashing Technique, and it was not a short branch.

The Forbidden Spirit Root is very strong and difficult to cut, but the Ancient Slashing Technique, a great thousand Dao technique, specializes in slashing solid things, so it can cut off the Forbidden Spirit Root with a single blow, while the attacks of the other Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors are above Ye Tian, it is difficult to cut off the Forbidden Spirit Root with one blow.

For example, the fire Dao technique and the ice Dao technique, how can it cut off the forbidden spirit root?

After Ye Tian cut off the forbidden spirit root, he took away the forbidden spirit root branch at once, and immediately used the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step to quickly escape from here.

"Nine Extremes Heavenly King, Leave the Forbidden Spirit Root !!"

A Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor roared angrily.

Bang!!!

One Dao Technique attack after another bombarded Ye Tian's body, and many of them were attacks from the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.

I saw that Ye Tian's body was severely injured and even pierced again and again, if it weren't for Dacheng's forbidden body and the power of the forbidden origin to repair his body, I'm afraid he would have been killed in seconds.

But even so, after withstanding so many attacks, he was seriously injured.

Ye Tian didn't dare to continue to snatch the remaining forbidden spirit root, that was an act of looking for death.

As Ye Tian broke out of the encirclement, there were many fewer Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors who were chasing him, after all, Ye Tian's life-saving ability was too strong, and other Dao Ancestors would lose the opportunity to continue to snatch the forbidden spirit root if they caught up with Ye Tian, which would outweigh the losses.

After a while, no one chased and killed Ye Tian.

......

Forbidden Void Realm, a void with no people.

Ye Tian arranged a simple concealment array, and then hid in it and began to heal.

At this moment, Ye Tian looked very embarrassed as a whole, one arm disappeared without stopping, his body was full of holes, and the blood was almost drained.

This is still just an injury on the surface, inside his body, the power of rules destroys his body, if it weren't for the Dacheng-level forbidden body to offset the attack injury, he is afraid that he will definitely die now.

Moreover, the average Dao Ancestor has been injured like this, and he doesn't want to recover from it for hundreds of millions of years.

Ye Tian urged the forbidden technique and used the power of the forbidden origin to repair his body.

Gradually, he recovered from his injuries.

"The power of the forbidden origin is too effective in repairing injuries!"

Ye Tian said happily.

It was precisely by relying on the infinite power of the forbidden origin that he would not dare to rush in like that to seize the forbidden spiritual root.

In short, this time he gained too much.

Speed up time, and soon after, Ye Tian's injuries all recovered.

Subsequently, he found a relatively hidden place, took out a palace, shrunk the palace and then cast a hidden array, and began to retreat and cultivate here.

Inside the palace.

Ye Tian took out the forbidden spirit root, and the torso of the forbidden spirit root, which was nearly three hundred meters long, lay on the ground, and drops of forbidden spirit root liquid flowed out of it.

Ye Tian took out the forbidden gourd to collect these forbidden spirit root liquids, and soon collected all the forbidden spirit root liquids, leaving only the forbidden spirit root shells.

This body can also be regarded as a cultivation resource, if it is refined, it can also improve cultivation, but after all, it is far less useful than the forbidden spirit root liquid.

So, Ye Tian incorporated this body into the inner world.

Next, Ye Tian began to use the Forbidden Spirit Root Liquid to cultivate the Nine Extremes Dao Canon.

Rumble!

A drop of forbidden spirit root liquid entered, and a majestic energy poured into the whole body, becoming a new forbidden dao power under the refining of the Nine Extremes Dao Canon, and then slowly refining the body and soul, strengthening one's cultivation.

After refining just one drop of forbidden spirit root liquid, it was enough to be comparable to the previous thousand years of penance.

And refining a drop of forbidden spirit root liquid would take less than an hour, so you can imagine how fast the cultivation speed is.

What's more, there is almost no bottleneck in cultivating with the Forbidden Spirit Root Liquid, but there will be bottlenecks in penance, and from time to time it will be difficult to improve in cultivation.

Day by day, Ye Tian's cultivation has improved extremely fast, and he has also accelerated the time by ten thousand times, and he has cultivated for a long time under the acceleration of time, and the outside world has only passed for a while, and there will be no delay in time.

In the blink of an eye, three days had passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian had already cultivated for 30,000 days under the time array.

At this time, he had already refined most of the forbidden spirit root liquid, and the forbidden Dao power was dozens of times stronger, and the combat power had directly stepped into the bottleneck shackles between the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor and the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

Now, he is already a Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and he is also a relatively powerful Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

"The remaining forbidden spirit root liquid can be taken back to Yue'er, Xingchen, and Xingyue, and even if the remaining spirit root liquid is all refined, I won't be able to improve my strength much!" Ye Tian muttered.

This time, the Forbidden Void Realm gave birth to a rare forbidden treasure such as the Forbidden Spirit Root, indicating that there were definitely other Forbidden Spirit Roots in this Forbidden Void Realm.

He also wanted to seize more forbidden spirit roots, in this way, his growth speed was absolutely extremely fast, even if he wanted to step into the Supreme Dao Ancestor, it wouldn't take too long, otherwise no matter how demonic his talent was, it would be difficult for him to step into the ranks of the Supreme Dao Ancestor in a short period of time.

In addition, he also wanted to kill Long Fei Dao Ancestor.

With his current strength, he definitely has almost ninety percent hope to kill the other party, and he doesn't need to worry about the other party running away.

"The next two goals, find the Forbidden Spirit Root and kill the Dragon Fei Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian went out of the customs, put away the palace, lifted the formation, turned into a ray of light and disappeared.

--------------------

"Damn, the injury is too bad!"

Long Fei Dao Ancestor dragged his seriously injured body through the void, constantly shuttling and flying, changing direction.

He had already used a number of escape treasures, and only then did he evade the siege of several Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors, if he didn't have some background, I am afraid it would be over directly.

Soon, he was excited again.

This time, he was the first to see a black flower containing 108 petals, after his identification, the black flower was not an ordinary forbidden strange thing, but a very rare forbidden spirit root, each petal was enough to make people cultivate to a great progress.

He knew that his potential was almost exhausted, and he had no hope of stepping into the ranks of the strongest Dao Ancestors, but once he refined that forbidden spirit root flower, he could let his Dao power break the shackles and continue to improve.

He has the hope of becoming the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, overlooking those weak Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors.
